# XitSource: National Multifamily M&A and Investment
> Institutional-grade multifamily acquisitions and portfolio transitions.

## Core Investment Markets
- [National Market Hubs](/markets/): Directory of XitSource target markets.
- [Huntsville, AL](/markets/huntsville-al/): Defense and Aerospace-driven recession hedge.
- [Savannah, GA](/markets/savannah-ga/): Port-driven logistics and manufacturing growth.
- [SF Bay Area, CA](/markets/sf-bay-area/): AI-led innovation and recovery.

## Institutional Resources
- [Resource Hub](/resources/): Direct access to industry guides and risk analysis.
- [Tenant Equipment Guide](/resources/tenant-closed-equipment-left-behind): Risk management for abandoned assets.

## Contact & Dispositions
- [Submit Property for Review](https://www.xitsource.com/sell): Direct channel for portfolio dispositions.
